document_info.exam_name: TNPSC Group 4 Combined Civil Services Examination

questions.subject: History
questions.question_text: Who was the founder of the Chola dynasty?

explanation.english: Karikalan was the founder of the Chola dynasty. He is known for building the Kallanai (Grand Anicut), one of the oldest water diversion structures in the world.
explanation.tanglish: Karikalan Chola dynasty-oda founder ah iruppan. Avan Kallanai (Grand Anicut) build pannina, ava world-oda oldest water diversion structures之一.

questions.subject: Geography
questions.question_text: Which is the largest river in Tamil Nadu?

explanation.english: The Cauvery River is the largest river in Tamil Nadu, originating from the Western Ghats and flowing through the state before emptying into the Bay of Bengal.
explanation.tanglish: Cauvery River Tamil Nadu-oda largest river. Ivar Western Ghats-ku from aga start agi, state through agi flow panni, Bay of Bengal-ku povom.

questions.subject: Polity
questions.question_text: The Governor of Tamil Nadu is appointed by whom?

explanation.english: The Governor of a state is appointed by the President of India under Article 153 of the Indian Constitution. The current Governor of Tamil Nadu is R.N. Ravi.
explanation.tanglish: State Governor-o Government of India President appoint pannuvangaar. Article 153 under Indian Constitution-la ithu clear aga irukku.

questions.subject: Science
questions.question_text: What is the chemical formula of water?

explanation.english: Water is composed of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom, giving it the chemical formula H2O. It is essential for all known forms of life.
explanation.tanglish: Water-e two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom combine panni irukku. Chemical formula H2O. Ithu ellame known life forms-ku essential.

questions.subject: History
questions.question_text: In which year did India gain independence?

explanation.english: India gained independence from British rule on August 15, 1947. This was the result of years of freedom struggle led by Mahatma Gandhi and other leaders.
explanation.tanglish: India British rule-ku v Independence August 15, 1947-ku kidaikkachu. Mahatma Gandhi and matrimony leaders lead panna freedom struggle-result.

document_info.exam_name: Union Public Service Commission Civil Services Preliminary Examination

questions.subject: Polity
questions.question_text: Which article of the Indian Constitution abolishes untouchability?

explanation.english: Article 17 of the Indian Constitution abolishes untouchability and forbids its practice in any form. It enforcement is supplemented by the Protection of Civil Rights Act, 1955.
explanation.tanglish: Indian Constitution-oda Article 17 untouchability abolish pannidu. Ithu ellarum practice panna mudiyathu. Protection of Civil Rights Act, 1955 enforce pannidu.

explanation.english: GDP or Gross Domestic Product is the total monetary value of all finished goods and services produced within a country's borders in a specific time period.
explanation.tanglish: GDP Gross Domestic Product, country border-la produce panna finished goods and services-oda total monetary value.

document_info.exam_name: Staff Selection Commission Combined Graduate Level Examination

explanation.english: 15% of 200 = (15/100) × 200 = 30. This is a basic percentage calculation commonly asked in quantitative aptitude sections.
